title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues that inventing general relativity represents a final frontier test for AI systems. The framing positions fundamental scientific discovery as the ultimate measure of AI capability beyond current benchmarks.
